title: Quarkus Extension Descriptor
description: Schema for META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml validated at extension packaging time. Field descriptions in this file are the single source of truth; the extension metadata guide is generated from it at documentation build time.

artifact.description: Extension runtime artifact coordinates. In the author template this may use Maven expressions such as ${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}:${project.version}; the build replaces them with resolved coordinates. This field may be omitted from the template.

description.description: Description displayed to users. It may be provided in the template or copied from the extension module POM during the build.

scm-url.description: Source code repository URL. Optional in the template; often set automatically from POM SCM information or the CI environment (for example GITHUB_REPOSITORY on GitHub Actions).

sponsor.description: Sponsor of this extension. Optional; may be determined automatically from commit history.

metadata.description: Extension catalog metadata used by Quarkus dev tools.

short-name.description: Short name used to quickly locate an extension in the dev tools extension catalog.

keywords.description: Keywords used to search for extensions in the extension catalog.

categories.description: Categories under which the extension appears on https://code.quarkus.io. May be omitted; the extension is still listed but not categorized.

status.description: Maturity status. Must be a single string value, not an array. Use deprecated when the extension is likely to be replaced or removed. Evaluated by extension maintainers.

guide.description: Link to the extension guide or documentation page.

icon-url.description: URL of a square icon (greater than 220 pixels). Supported formats: png, jpeg, tiff, webp, svg. Alternatively, set the social media preview on the extension source repository.

config.description: Configuration property prefixes exposed by this extension.

artifact.description: Maven coordinates of the codestart artifact.

built-with-quarkus-core.description: Quarkus version the extension was built with. Added by the extension build plugin.

requires-quarkus-core.description: Quarkus version range required by this extension. Optional; defaults from built-with-quarkus-core. Added by the extension build plugin.

minimum-java-version.description: Minimum Java version required to run this extension. Generated from maven.compiler.release. Added by the extension build plugin.

capabilities.description: Capabilities this extension provides or requires. See https://quarkus.io/guides/capabilities. Added by the extension build plugin.

extension-dependencies.description: Direct dependencies on other extensions. Added by the extension build plugin.

.+-support$.description: Associates the extension with an offering (introduced in Quarkus 3.26). The property name is <offering-id>-support; the value is a list of support scopes such as supported or tech-preview.
